files.patch: @@ -1245,1 +1245,4 @@ - * the {@linkplain Object Object methods} may throw {@linkplain NoSuchElementException}. + * the {@linkplain List#hashCode()} and {@linkplain List#toString()} methods throw + * {@linkplain NoSuchElementException}, and the {@linkplain List#equals(Object)} + * may throw {@linkplain NoSuchElementException} depending on which + * elements (if any) are compared.

@@ -1796,2 +1796,5 @@ - * one or more lazy values. If initialization fails for at least one value, - * the {@linkplain Object Object methods} may throw {@linkplain NoSuchElementException}. + * one or more lazy values. If initialization fails for at least one value, + * the {@linkplain Map#hashCode()} and {@linkplain Map#toString()} methods throw + * {@linkplain NoSuchElementException}, and the {@linkplain Map#equals(Object)} + * may throw {@linkplain NoSuchElementException} depending on which + * entries (if any) are compared.

@@ -791,1 +791,4 @@ - * the {@linkplain Object Object methods} may throw {@linkplain NoSuchElementException}. + * the {@linkplain Set#hashCode()} and {@linkplain Set#toString()} methods throw + * {@linkplain NoSuchElementException}, and the {@linkplain Set#equals(Object)} + * may throw {@linkplain NoSuchElementException} depending on which + * elements (if any) are compared.
